titleStmt.title: SII 34.260: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 260. Tiruvaranguḷam, Alangudi Taluk, Pudukkottai District. On the south wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Haratīrthēśvara temple.

summary.p: The taxes due from the nagarattār of Vallanāḍaṉ-perunderu as a part of the nāḍu were gifted to the Tiruvaraṅguḷam-uḍaiya-nāyaṉār temple for burning a sandhyā lamp for the merit of Chēmappiḷḷaiyār by one of the latter's mudalis (officers).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīvīrapāṇṭiya tEvaṟku yāṇṭu Aiñcāvatu Uṭaiyār
tiruvaraṉkuḷamuṭaiya nāyaṉāṟku nāyanār cēmappiḷḷaiyār tirumēṉikku naṉṟāka caṉtiyātīpat ti
ru viḷakkikku valla nāṭaṉ perunteruvil nakarattārai nāṭṭu vi ḻukkāṭṭuppaṭi Accu Uṭaiyār tiruvarankuḷa
muṭaiya nāyaṉāṟku nāyaṉār tiruvuḷamāy Aruḷa tirumalaiyilē kalveṭṭik kuṭuttōm nāyaṉār mutalikaḷil vaṉputē
mican tirunaṭṭaperumāḷāṉa vīratēvaṉēṉ Ivai Eṉ Eḻuttu nāyaṉār kaṇkāṇik kaṇakkum Aḻakiya cēmavēḷā
ṉēṉ Ivai Eṉṉeḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 34.260 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
